title: Iran plans to charge ships for safe passage through Strait of Hormuz, report says
summary_full: Officials in Tehran have drafted legislation to create a toll system where ships pay for safe passage through the waterway, Iranian media reported.
summary_public: Officials in Tehran have drafted legislation to create a toll system where ships pay for safe passage through the waterway, Iranian media reported.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran plans to charge ships for safe passage through Strait of Hormuz
